Paper Flock

Find the path. Turn the flock. Let the sky unfold.

Birds 0
Feathers 3/3

Chapter Dawn Flight
Journey 0 of 60 journey feathers

Complete the flock to earn up to three feathers.

Mastery goal: complete a clean flight.

Settings

Choose a flock

Replay completed levels to earn more feathers. Locked levels open by completing the level before them; nothing on this map is paid.

Collection

Paper skies

Optional variety

Today’s Daily Flock

One puzzle generated for your local calendar date. There is no timer, streak, lost reward, notification, or penalty for skipping it.
